description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior appears to be finished in a combination of dark and light materials, likely concrete, glass, and metal, with some green landscaping elements visible near the base. The house sits on a wide, patterned platform that could represent a driveway or patio area. The overall impression is of a sleek, urban residence designed for a high-density neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a sleek, boxy design. The exterior combines dark and light materials and sits on a wide, patterned base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, and a stepped upper story with visible landscaping elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid, dark facade with minimal window openings and the depth of the platform base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the setback upper story, flat roof, and a more enclosed, private facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of open and closed sections, visible vertical window strips, and the patterned base extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flush door, minimal steps, and a clean, unornamented facade
